subcodes.first_line: O 'Ali! Upon thee be the eternal peace of God! Truly I say this Wronged One has had and has no other intention… Cling firmly to obligatory prayer and fasting
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک سلام الله الابدی براستی میگویم این مظلوم جز تهذیب نفوس و اطفاء
subcodes.subjects: @law of fasting, @law of obligatory prayer, @words vs deeds, @spiritual transformation
